ModMetaData.name: Facial Animation Statue Snapshot Fix
ModMetaData.author: RunningBugs
ModMetaData.description:
Patches Facial Animation's statue snapshot hook to tolerate duplicate facial controller comps.
This fixes trader stock / faction leader statue generation crashes like: System.ArgumentException: An item with the same key has already been added. Key: FacialAnimation.HeadControllerComp
The patch changes Facial Animation's snapshot dictionary write from a strict Add to a safe add that keeps the first value and ignores duplicate keys. It does not remove or mutate pawn comps.
修复 Facial Animation 在雕像快照/贸易库存生成时，因为重复面部控制器组件向 Dictionary.Add 写入相同 key 而抛错的问题。本补丁不删除 pawn 的组件，只让快照保存逻辑容忍重复 key，并保留第一个值。
